column17: Description
22µF 16V X5R MLCC, 1206, non-polarized. Sync delay capacitor for HSync/VSync XOR sync combiner.
22µF 16V X5R MLCC, 1206, non-polarized. +5V_LOAD bulk / input buffer capacitor after power-source jumper.
100nF 16V X7R MLCC, 1206, non-polarized. Local decoupling capacitor for IC1 VCC/GND.
Shielded RGBS cable, LAPP UNITRONIC LiYCY 5x0.34mm², black. Carries R, G, B, C-Sync and GND to the Audi RNS-E connector.
Shielded stereo audio cable, Cordial CPK 220 BK. Carries left/right audio and ground to the 3.5mm TRS plug.
TE Micro-MATE-N-LOK crimp socket contacts, 20–24 AWG, for RGBS_OUT cable housing J7. Excluded from board, included in BOM.
TE MQS 0.63mm female crimp contacts, 0.20–0.35mm² / 22–24 AWG, for Audi/RNS-E 32-pin connector J9. Excluded from board, included in BOM.
Broadcom 527 nm Green LED, 3216 (1206) SMD package
High Speed CMOS Logic Quad 2-Input Exclusive-OR Gates

Amphenol ICC HD-15 VGA Socket, Right Angle PCB Through Hole, 15 Position, 4-40 Front Screwlock, Ground Tab, Boardlock. Alternative: L77HDE15SD1CH4FVGA, blue VGA version with matching footprint/pinout.
2.54MM PIN HEADER, 5 position
JST ZR Series 1.5mm Pitch, 2 Way, 1 Row, Shrouded Top Entry PCB Header, Through Hole
TE Connectivity Micro-MATE-N-LOK 5 Position Right Angle PCB Mount Header, 3mm Pitch, Wire-to-Board, for RGBS_OUT
GCT USB Type-C Receptacle, Power-Only, Right Angle SMD, USB4135-GF-A
JST ZR 2-pin cable assembly for optional external 5V input. Excluded from board, included in complete BOM. PCB polarity: Pin 2 = +5V, Pin 1 = GND.
TE Micro-MATE-N-LOK 5-position cable housing for RGBS output cable. Excluded from board, included in complete BOM.
Audio Jack, 3 Poles (Stereo / TRS)
Audi/VW 32-pin RNS-E AV connector housing for RGBS/audio cable connection. Excluded from board, included in complete BOM.
Jumper, 2-pole, closed/bridged
2.2kΩ 1% resistor, 1206. RC delay resistor for HSync/VSync XOR sync combiner.
2.2kΩ 1% resistor, 1206. Power LED series resistor.
5.1kΩ 1% resistor, 1206. USB-C CC pull-down resistor for 5V sink detection.
200Ω 1% resistor, 1206. C-Sync output series resistor.
